title: Om Jai Jagdish Hare
intro: The most popular universal aarti, sung for all deities.
description:
|| Om Jai Jagdish Hare ||
Om Jai Jagdish Hare, Swami Jai Jagdish Hare.
Bhakt janon ke sankat, Das janon ke sankat,
Kshan mein door kare.
meaning: This aarti praises the glory of the Lord and prays for the removal of devotees' troubles.

faq.a1: This universal aarti can be sung at the close of worship of any deity.
faq.a2: Yes, this aarti is meant for all devotees.
